title: Suricatoos — reNgine→OpenVAS Scan Request
description: Request body reNgine (score) POSTs to the scanner's mTLS /ingest/v1/scan-request endpoint to launch a scoped OpenVAS scan against recon-discovered hosts. Bound in lockstep by ingest/scanlaunch (Go), gmp-bridge/scan_bridge.py (Python), and reNgine web/Suricatoos/scanner_bridge.py. Hosts MUST be IP literals — the scanner is authoritative and never resolves hostnames (no scan-time DNS rebinding).

rengine_scan_history_id.description: reNgine ScanHistory PK; the correlation/idempotency anchor. Encoded in the GVM task name suricatoos-rengine-{id}.

target.description: reNgine Domain name, informational only (never used as a scan target).

hosts.description: Live hosts to scan. Each ip MUST be an IP literal (v4 or v6); the scanner rejects anything net.ParseIP cannot parse.

ip.description: IPv4 or IPv6 literal. Hostnames are rejected (422).

ports.description: Open TCP ports discovered by reNgine; the target-wide union scopes the OpenVAS port_range (T:...).
